bodyTextStart: Skip to main content Overview Profile Communications Matching Settings Proofound Verifications U Proof verification requests Follow which proof, claim, verifier, and bounded outcome each request is tied to. Incoming 2 Sent 2 All 2 Active Pending 1 Needs attention 2 Declined Expired / stale Revoked / corrected Newest Scope Showing all requests. Active means accepted and current; pending requests are still waiting for a response. MA Mira Andersson Asked you to confirm a proof-backed claim Pending Manager SCOPE Skill observed in context TIED TO Proof-first hiring corridor readiness review CLAIM Confirm that the proof pack clearly connects privat
